name_en: Chane1 Vintage AS6025. Vintage enthusiasts will recognize this bag. This double-C double-buckle briefcase is an original from the 1990s, full of vintage charm. The bag features a structured briefcase silhouette with smooth, bold lines. Paired with double-C double-buckles on fine leather, its charm may take time to appreciate but is worth savoring. It looks professional yet cute. It also features a chain that can be worn crossbody or shoulder, or unlocked for a new stylish look. It can also be carried by hand, making it lively, elegant, and unique. Very practical. Size: 23×16cm
